title: Unleash The Power of monday.com!
excerpt: Are you ready to streamline your business and watch your results soar? Imagine a workspace where everything just flows – projects on track, sales skyrocketing, and your team thriving. Join us to Unleash The Power of mond…

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you ready to streamline your business and watch your results soar? Imagine a workspace where everything just flows – projects on track, sales skyrocketing, and your team thriving. Join us to Unleash The Power of monday.com.

We’ll unlock new ways of working by powering your business with new efficiencies through automation and streamlining processes using monday.com. Understand how your teams can drive innovation and effortlessly show progress towards your business goals. Avoid micromanagement, keep your employees aligned and motivated, and unlock success with clear visibility over your processes.

Next, we’ll show you how to give your sales team the edge they need! You’ll learn how to tailor monday CRM for maximum impact and discover the secrets to increased sales team engagement, effortless goal tracking, and faster wins.

Finally, we’ll deep dive into transforming ideas into reality with monday dev. We’ll focus on innovation strategies, tackling developer roadblocks, setting commercial targets, and seamlessly integrating monday dev across your business.

Join us for an immersive event where we bring monday.com to life and demo all 3 monday products live!

monday work management: Watch how monday.com streamlines projects, tasks, and collaboration for unmatched efficiency.

monday sales CRM: See how customer relationships become your superpower with a centralised CRM platform.

monday dev: Discover how dev empowers development teams to plan, track, and ship code faster.

Live demos, Expert on hand for Q&A, drinks & canapes, networking, and the opportunity to take your business to new heights. Plus, an exclusive extended free trial on a monday.com product of your choice* and the chance to win an Apple iPad mini, Apple Airpods or £50 Amazon Gift Card! Sound appealing?

*Attendees must be physically at the event to claim their prize(s)

Wednesday 10th July
﻿﻿⏰ 2:30pm-7pm
Marco Pierre White’s, ﻿The Cube, Birmingham

https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/unleash-the-power-of-mondaycom-tickets-902328377467?aff=mondaycalenda…

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Juliette,

Hoping you got my message about the incorrect date for our Birmingham event? It’s in your calendar as 12th June when it’s 10th July.

Sorry my previous message seems to have disappeared! Can you correct please?

Thanks
Becky
